reasoning_trace.cannot_prove: Cannot prove genuine style demand or repeat purchase intent.

eval-discount-trap.headline: ⚡ Sources disagree: Nykaa absent, Myntra shows subsidized liquidation, Meesho shows price-driven volume. No clean demand signal.

conflicts.title: Nykaa absent vs Myntra/Meesho strong presence
conflicts.nykaa_says: No premium demand; style not present in premium D2C.
conflicts.myntra_says: Strong presence but demand is discount-driven (Subsidized Liquidation).
conflicts.meesho_says: Strong volume at low price (₹299) with moderate rating.
conflicts.buyer_question: Is there any genuine style demand beyond deep discounts and low prices?
conflicts.proves: The style sells when heavily discounted or priced very low.
conflicts.cannot_prove: Cannot prove the style has intrinsic demand at higher price points or without discount.

convergences.title: Volume at low price points
convergences.detail: Both Myntra (discounted) and Meesho (low price) show high unit sales.
convergences.proves: The style can move volume when price is the primary driver.
convergences.cannot_prove: Cannot prove demand is sustainable or style-driven.

eval-discount-trap.upside_summary: The style shows strong sales volume on Myntra (rank 3) and Meesho (8000+ units), indicating broad appeal at low price points. If sourced at a low cost, there may be opportunity in value-fashion channels.
eval-discount-trap.catch_summary: All demand signals are price-driven: Myntra's sales are subsidized liquidation (65% off, low rating), and Meesho's volume is at ₹299. No premium or organic demand evidence exists. Internal POS has no history, and no social or ad data to validate trend.

nykaa.reason: No products found; absence is a strong negative signal for premium demand.

myntra.reason: Strong presence but heavily distorted by Subsidized Liquidation; review velocity down-weighted 75%.

meesho.reason: Strong volume but low price and moderate rating; reseller growth not accelerating.

internal.reason: No prior data; cannot confirm or deny.

eval-discount-trap.bet_rationale: All available demand is price-driven with no clean signal of style preference. Without internal validation or organic buzz, capital commitment is premature.
eval-discount-trap.key_uncertainty: Would this style sell at a moderate price (₹599-899) without deep discounting?

eval-premium-mirage.upside_summary: Premium demand is confirmed at full price on Nykaa with high ratings, and Myntra shows moderate demand with clean pricing. If this style resonates with premium buyers, it could be a high-margin niche.
eval-premium-mirage.catch_summary: Complete absence on Meesho suggests no demand in price-sensitive segments. The trend may be too premium for mass adoption, limiting volume potential. Internal POS has no prior data to validate.

myntra.reason: Moderate presence, low discount, good reviews — clean signal

eval-mass-only.catch_summary: Nykaa's absence and Myntra's discount dependency suggest this may be a price-driven commodity with limited premium appeal. Internal POS has no prior data, adding uncertainty.

eval-golden-convergence.headline: All sources converge: strong clean demand across premium and value tiers

convergences.title: Nykaa + Myntra + Meesho all strong
convergences.detail: Nykaa shows premium full-price demand, Myntra shows mass-market demand at low discount, Meesho shows high volume with reseller growth. All three indicate genuine style preference.
convergences.proves: The style has broad appeal across price segments with minimal discount distortion.
convergences.cannot_prove: Your store's specific sell-through or margin performance.

convergences.title: Low discount across all sources
convergences.detail: Nykaa 5% off, Myntra 10% off (Strategic Value Pricing), Meesho no discount mentioned. No liquidation or suspect discounts.
convergences.cannot_prove: Future pricing elasticity or competitive response.

eval-golden-convergence.upside_summary: Strong, clean demand signals across premium (Nykaa), mass (Myntra), and value (Meesho) segments. Low discount levels indicate genuine style preference. Meesho reseller growth suggests expanding reach into tier-2/3/4 markets.
eval-golden-convergence.catch_summary: No internal POS data to validate against your store's performance. No competitor ad or social buzz data to assess organic vs paid demand. The price gap between Nykaa (₹1450) and Meesho (₹349) may indicate different customer expectations.

nykaa.reason: Strong presence with full-price products and high ratings.

myntra.reason: Strong presence, low discount, high review velocity, clean demand integrity.

meesho.reason: Strong volume and reseller growth, though price point is low.

internal.reason: No prior data available; cannot confirm or contradict.

eval-golden-convergence.bet_rationale: All three external sources converge on strong, clean demand with low discount distortion. The style shows appeal across price tiers, suggesting broad market potential. Recommend widening to multiple stores or regions.
eval-golden-convergence.key_uncertainty: Will the style perform similarly in your store's specific customer base without prior data?

organza-embroidered.headline: ⚡ Sources disagree: Strong premium/mass demand (Nykaa, Myntra, Internal POS) but weak value-market signal (Meesho) and low social buzz (YouTube)

conflicts.title: Meesho weak vs Nykaa/Myntra strong
conflicts.meesho_says: Weak demand at ₹449 with low rating
conflicts.internal_says: Proven demand at ₹1,200+ but narrow window
conflicts.buyer_question: Is the trend only viable at premium/mass price points, or will it trickle down to value-fashion?
conflicts.proves: Demand exists at ₹1,200+ with clean signals
conflicts.cannot_prove: Whether a ₹799 version will capture mass-market demand

conflicts.title: YouTube low buzz vs Meta ad conviction
conflicts.buyer_question: Is the demand organic or being propped up by paid advertising?
conflicts.proves: Competitors are investing in ads (Biba 45 days)
conflicts.cannot_prove: Whether consumer interest is genuine or ad-dependent

convergences.title: Nykaa, Myntra, Internal POS, Meta Ads all point to strong demand at ₹1,200-1,900
convergences.detail: Nykaa shows premium interest, Myntra shows clean mass demand, Internal POS confirms past success, Meta ads show competitor conviction
convergences.proves: Organza embroidered kurtis have proven demand at ₹1,200+
convergences.cannot_prove: Whether demand extends to lower price points or longer windows

convergences.title: Myntra and Internal POS both show low discount, high rating, and strategic pricing
convergences.detail: Myntra products at 10% off with 4.5★; Internal POS achieved 48% margin with only 5% markdown
convergences.cannot_prove: Whether this holds at ₹799 or during non-festive periods

organza-embroidered.upside_summary: Strong convergence across premium (Nykaa), mass retail (Myntra), and your own store data (Internal POS) confirms organza embroidered kurtis are a proven winner at ₹1,200-1,900. Competitor ad spend (Biba) reinforces conviction. The trend has festive/wedding occasion anchoring, which drives urgency and full-price sell-through.
organza-embroidered.catch_summary: Meesho's weak signal suggests the trend has not yet trickled down to value-fashion — a ₹799 version may not capture the same demand. YouTube's low organic buzz indicates the trend is not creator-driven, so reliance on paid push may be needed. Internal POS warns of a narrow 3-week festive window; over-committing could lead to post-festive markdowns.

nykaa.reason: Only 1 product found; discount-distorted (no full-price); editorial placement may inflate signal

myntra.reason: 2 products with clean strategic pricing, high rating, and good review velocity; no noise flags

meesho.reason: Only 1 product with low rating and moderate volume; reseller growth not accelerating

internal.reason: Direct past sales data with strong sell-through and margin; relevant SKU

organza-embroidered.bet_rationale: Strong convergence at ₹1,200+ but Meesho weakness and YouTube low buzz create uncertainty about value-fashion and organic demand. A small batch at ₹799-999 in select stores during pre-festive window can validate trickle-down potential without over-committing.
organza-embroidered.key_uncertainty: Will a ₹799 version of organza embroidered kurti achieve similar sell-through and margin as the ₹1,200+ versions?
watch_triggers: Meesho reseller count crosses 50 or units sold exceeds 2,000
YouTube haul videos exceed 30/month or affiliate density rises above 0.5
Nykaa adds more full-price products or editorial features
Internal POS early sell-through of trial batch exceeds 50% in first week
missing_evidence: Meesho product with higher rating (>4.0) or accelerating reseller growth
YouTube affiliate link density above 0.5 (commercial interest)
organza-embroidered.demand_integrity: Clean at premium/mass; uncertain at value
